message:
fix(conformance): correct Timer Ord tiebreaker for min-heap semantics

The Timer Ord impl had a nonsensical tiebreaker — .then_with(|| self.when_ms.cmp(&other.when_ms)) — that reversed the primary
comparison on ties, producing undefined ordering when two timers had
equal scheduled times.

Replace with a clean reverse comparison that maintains BinaryHeap
min-heap semantics (Rust's BinaryHeap is a max-heap; wrapping via
Reverse or inverting cmp yields a min-heap). Earlier when_ms values
now correctly pop first, with stable behavior on ties.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
